name: Alexander Cole
hobbies_and_interests: Intramural soccer and basketball, Hiking Wisconsin trails, Camping trips, Volunteer work at local food bank and health fairs, Playing acoustic guitar, Cooking healthy meals, Board game nights with friends, DIY electronics and smart‑home projects, Reading about pharmaceutical technology, Running and yoga, Fishing trips
skills_and_expertise: Prescription verification, Medication compounding, Pharmacy inventory management, Electronic health record navigation, Patient counseling, Medication therapy management support, Regulatory compliance (HIPAA, state pharmacy law), First Aid & CPR certification, Pharmacy software operation (PioneerRx, QS/1), Automation equipment operation, Quality control and error checking, Team collaboration and shift scheduling, Data entry accuracy, Problem solving, Time management
complementary_info: Alexander Cole is a pharmacy technician student with a strong focus on precision and patient care, aiming to complete his bachelor's degree in biological sciences and eventually earn a PharmD. He excels in prescription verification, medication compounding, and inventory management, maintaining a nearly error-free record. Alexander balances his disciplined career aspirations with an active and socially engaged lifestyle, participating in intramural sports, hiking, and volunteering at local food banks and health fairs. He is passionate about healthy cooking, DIY electronics, and playing the acoustic guitar. Alexander's long-term goals include becoming a licensed pharmacist and pharmacy manager, focusing on patient education and preventive care, particularly in underserved rural areas. He is also interested in pharmacy informatics and mentoring future pharmacy students.
